title: Vanilla Enhanced
description: Designed to make the HUD and UI more consistent with other versions of the game (a.k.a. bedrock, dungeons, legends) by changing the textures and designs of various elements such as the hotbar, inventory, and health/armor bars.
body:
Changed all vanilla GUI, HUD textures to make them more consistent with other minecraft versions (bedrock, dungeons, legends)

FROM NOW ON I WILL ONLY MAKE 1.20.2+ TEXTURES! 1.3 IS THE LAST VERSION TO SUPPORT  VERSIONS LOWER THAN 1.20.2

### **old versions, 1.0-1.2 \\/**

I replaced Diorite with Limestone (no need to thank me) jokes aside you can revert the change by removing the lang and block folders)

Vanilla_Enhanced\assets\minecraft\lang

Vanilla_Enhanced\assets\minecraft\textures\block
